captured_at_phase: T0.2.1 Phase 1 spike-2 — runtime confirmation per feedback_runtime_confirmation_after_web_spike.md
score_caveat: observed_score_spike_2 values are EMPIRICAL OBSERVATIONS from spike-2 runtime, NOT a locked contract. T0.2.3 consolidator MUST treat score as a confidence signal (e.g., threshold > 0.7) NOT a deterministic threshold-comparator (e.g., score == 1.0). Score behavior may shift under model swap, quantization changes, or prompt template revisions. The load-bearing assertion across model swaps is expected_merge (boolean); the score value is documentation.
schema_caveat: expected_merge is the load-bearing semantic assertion. observed_merged_text_spike_2 is documentary only — the exact merged-text string may shift under model swap and is NOT a regression target.

cases.label: identical-B
cases.rationale: exact duplicate with specific time/date — high-confidence merge expected

cases.label: similar-A
cases.observed_merged_text_spike_2: Bought groceries today and picked up groceries this afternoon
cases.rationale: paraphrase of same action — mid-to-high confidence merge expected; tests model's ability to recognize semantic equivalence across surface form variance

cases.label: unrelated-A
cases.rationale: topically unrelated — no-merge expected; tests model's ability to reject false-positive merges of distinct topics

cases.label: unrelated-B
cases.rationale: different life-domain entries (health vs work) — no-merge expected
